name: Minimax
philosophy: MiniMax presents itself as a premium AI infrastructure brand through a striking duality — bold black-pill CTAs and stark white canvas for marketing, paired with vibrant gradient product cards (orange-red, magenta-pink, purple, blue) that turn each model release into a distinctive visual identity.
trademark_signals: Stark monochrome palette — black  and white  — broken open by saturated brand-color gradient cards
Distinct product-color encoding: each model line has its own vibrant brand color (coral M2.7, magenta Music 2.6, blue Hailuo, orange Speech 2.8)
DM Sans across the entire system; Inter as fallback
Pill-shaped buttons  and pill-shaped tabs everywhere; rectangular forms only inside data tables and dense docs
Hero typography uses tight 1.10 line-height with -2px letter-spacing for impact
ai_slop_avoided: use brand-coral or brand-magenta on body text or large surfaces — they lose meaning when overused
soften corners on buttons (anything less than ); the pill is a brand signature
introduce a second display typeface; DM Sans handles every role
